title: matelea pueblensis
intro: Matelea pueblensis, also known as the 'Tiger's Claw' or 'Coral Milkflower,' is a species of flowering plant in the Apocynaceae family, native to Mexico. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Matelea pueblensis are believed to have anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects, which are thought to benefit conditions such as wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Matelea pueblensis can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various ailments.
